task: We’re expecting our first baby and I want a really practical shortlist of the best hospitals in Los Angeles for giving birth, not just a generic list, so could you use Google to research LA-area hospitals that clearly offer maternity, obstetrics, and labor-and-delivery services and then narrow that down to the 10 strongest options for childbirth? I’d like you to lean on a mix of official hospital maternity pages and something like U.S. News or similar quality indicators so I can tell which places are actually recognized, not just nearby. As you find good candidates, open each hospital’s actual maternity or labor-and-delivery page in its own tab and keep those tabs open so I can visually review the pages and photos afterward. For each of the final 10 hospitals, please verify on the official site that labor and delivery is explicitly offered, note the hospital name and Los Angeles-area location, write a short plain-English description of the maternity program, and capture whether it shows up in rankings, recognitions, or other quality signals. Then create a CryptPad Document file titled exactly “Best LA Maternity Hospitals” and put all 10 hospitals in it with the maternity-page links included, because I want one place where I can compare everything. Once that looks complete, add a short comparison section explaining the main differences between the hospitals, any patterns you noticed in the rankings or maternity offerings, and which few seem like the strongest recommendations overall. Please leave the CryptPad Document open at the end along with the 10 hospital maternity tabs so I can click through them myself.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully identified a credible pool of 10 Los Angeles-area hospitals with maternity services. It used Google searches to find official hospital pages (e.g., Cedars-Sinai, UCLA Health, Huntington, Torrance Memorial, Providence locations, Kaiser Permanente, and Miller Children's & Women's) and cross-referenced these with reputable quality indicators like U.S. News & World Report maternity ratings and Newsweek rankings. The search history and the final CryptPad document confirm that the agent sourced these candidates from official hospital websites and reputable healthcare sources.

R2: success - The agent successfully researched 10 hospitals in the Los Angeles area that offer maternity and labor-and-delivery services, grounding the selection in quality signals such as U.S. News maternity ratings and other recognitions. The agent created a CryptPad document titled “Best LA Maternity Hospitals” and populated it with the 10 hospitals, including links to their official maternity pages and descriptions of their programs. The document also includes a comparison section as requested. The final state shows the CryptPad document open and populated with the required information.

R3: success - The agent successfully researched 10 Los Angeles-area hospitals with maternity services, verified their official pages, and created a CryptPad document titled "Best LA Maternity Hospitals" containing the requested information. The agent opened the 10 hospital maternity/labor-and-delivery pages in separate browser tabs (tabs 1-10 in the final tab list) and left them open alongside the CryptPad document (tab 11). The verification step confirms that the browser tab bar contains the 10 hospital-domain tabs corresponding to the hospitals listed in the document.

R4: success - The agent successfully researched 10 Los Angeles-area hospitals, verified their maternity/labor-and-delivery services through official hospital pages, and compiled this information into a CryptPad document titled “Best LA Maternity Hospitals.” The agent also kept the 10 official maternity pages open in separate tabs as requested. The final CryptPad document includes the hospital names, locations, descriptions of maternity programs, and quality signals, and explicitly confirms for each that labor and delivery services are offered.

R5: success - The agent successfully researched 10 Los Angeles-area hospitals for maternity care, verified their labor and delivery services, and gathered quality indicators (U.S. News, Newsweek, etc.) for each. The agent created a CryptPad document titled “Best LA Maternity Hospitals” and populated it with the required information, including links to official maternity pages and notes on rankings/recognitions. The document content is visible in the final screenshots, confirming that the ranking and quality-indicator evidence was gathered and included for the hospitals.

R6: success - The agent successfully created a CryptPad document titled "Best LA Maternity Hospitals". The document contains a shortlist of 10 hospitals, each with the required information: name, location, maternity program description, ranking/recognition status, and official maternity page link. The agent also included a comparison section as requested. The document is open and visible in the final screenshots.

R7: success - The agent successfully created a CryptPad document titled "Best LA Maternity Hospitals". The document contains a list of 10 hospitals with links and descriptions, and it concludes with a "Strongest few recommendations overall" section that provides a comparative summary. The agent verified that the document and the hospital tabs remained open at the end of the session. The screenshots confirm the document content and its presence in the browser.
